summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tiered TA Pipeline (Starter Plan Upgrade). All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly. The upgrade implements a two-tier technical analysis pipeline: Tier 1 fast scan (80 stocks, 5-min bars, composite prefilter score) and Tier 2 deep analysis (top 20, full multi-timeframe).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan returns timing object with total_cycle_sec, tier1_scan_sec, tier2_scan_sec - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan timing includes tier1_symbols, tier1_results, tier1_passed, tier1_rejected_early - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan timing includes tier2_symbols, tier2_results - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan timing includes ta_cache with hit_rate percentage - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan timing includes bar_cache stats - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan stats includes ta_analyzed, tier1_passed, tier2_deep, setups_found, filters_passed - SUCCESS
Backend: Tier 1 analyzes ~70+ stocks (up to 80 max) - SUCCESS (70 analyzed from 80 symbols)
Backend: Tier 1 completes in under 10 seconds - SUCCESS (0.8s observed)
Backend: Tier 2 deep analyzes top ~20 stocks - SUCCESS (20 symbols, 20 results)
Backend: Second scan within 5 min shows higher cache hit rate - SUCCESS (90% hit rate observed)
Backend: POST /api/auto-trade/refresh-ta triggers and returns db_cached count - SUCCESS
Backend: Pipeline funnel has all 8 stages (universe_scanned, prefilter_passed, ta_analyzed, setup_found, filters_passed, confidence_passed, risk_approved, executed) - SUCCESS
Backend: Day trade candidates have tier1_score and analysis_mode fields - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page renders with data-testid='auto-trade-page' - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page shows PAPER deploy mode badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page shows CAUTIOUS risk mode badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page shows NEUTRAL BEARISH | Vol: 14.8% regime badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page has 'Refresh TA Data' button - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Diagnostics tab shows 'Tiered TA Pipeline Diagnostics' card - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Diagnostics tab shows T1 Fast Scan, T1 Passed, T2 Deep, Total Cycle columns - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Diagnostics tab shows cache stats (90% hit rate, 127 bar cache entries) - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Candidates tab shows stats bar with T1 Analyzed, T2 Deep columns - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Day Trades tab shows candidates with direction, setup, tier1_score - SUCCESS
Frontend: AutoTrade page Pipeline Funnel shows all 8 stages with counts - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: Tiered TA Pipeline correctly implements two-tier analysis: Tier 1 fast scan (80 stocks, 5-min bars only) and Tier 2 deep analysis (top 20, full multi-timeframe)

Tier 1 composite prefilter score (compute_tier1_score) correctly uses: rel_vol (0-25pts), range expansion (0-20pts), VWAP distance (0-15pts), setup presence (0-20pts), spread quality (0-10pts), structure clarity (0-10pts)
Tier 1 early rejections correctly filter: wide_spread, illiquid, overextended, no_signal
TACache correctly tracks hit_rate percentage with hits/misses counters
BarCache is timeframe-aware with key format: symbol:timespan:multiplier

Timing object correctly includes all required fields: total_cycle_sec, tier1_scan_sec, tier2_scan_sec, tier1_symbols, tier1_results, tier1_passed, tier1_rejected_early, tier2_symbols, tier2_results, ta_cache, bar_cache
Stats object correctly includes: ta_analyzed, tier1_passed, tier2_deep, setups_found, filters_passed
Day trade candidates correctly include tier1_score and analysis_mode fields
Frontend correctly displays Tiered TA Pipeline Diagnostics card with T1 Fast Scan, T1 Passed, T2 Deep, DT Candidates, Total Cycle
Frontend stats bar correctly shows T1 Analyzed and T2 Deep columns
seed_data_creation: None required - using live market data from Polygon API and cached TA signals in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tiered TA Pipeline (Starter Plan Upgrade) fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Timing object has all required fields: total_cycle_sec, tier1_scan_sec, tier2_scan_sec, tier1_symbols, tier1_results, tier1_passed, tier1_rejected_early, tier2_symbols, tier2_results, ta_cache, bar_cache. 2) Stats include ta_analyzed, tier1_passed, tier2_deep, setups_found, filters_passed. 3) Tier 1 fast scan processes 80 stocks in ~0.8s using 5-min bars only. 4) Tier 2 deep analysis processes top 20 stocks with full multi-timeframe. 5) Cache hit rate reaches 90% on second scan. 6) Day trade candidates have tier1_score and analysis_mode fields. 7) Frontend shows Tiered TA Pipeline Diagnostics card with T1 Fast Scan, T1 Passed, T2 Deep, Total Cycle columns. 8) Frontend stats bar shows T1 Analyzed and T2 Deep columns.

frontend_components.tiered_ta_diagnostics_card: Shows T1 Fast Scan, T1 Passed, T2 Deep, DT Candidates, Total Cycle
frontend_components.stats_bar: Shows Scanned, T1 Analyzed, T2 Deep, Setups, Day Trades, Watchlist, Rejected
frontend_components.pipeline_funnel: Shows 8 stages with counts and bottleneck detection
frontend_components.refresh_ta_button: Triggers background TA refresh for 80 stocks
